name: Potato & Bean Pie.
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Mix kidney beans with chopped tomatoes, onion, and mushrooms in a bowl.
3. Add a pinch of chili powder and mix well.
4. In another bowl, mash the potatoes and combine with the low-fat spread.
5. Spread the potato mixture into a pie dish.
6. Pour the bean mixture over the top of the mashed potatoes.
7. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until golden brown.
8. Turn off the oven and let cool slightly before serving.
